collections.name: maps
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_maps_name ON maps (name)

collections.name: locations
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_locations_map ON locations (mapId)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_locations_map_name ON locations (mapId, name)

collections.name: players
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_players_user_id ON players (userId)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_players_auth_user_id ON players (authUserId) WHERE authUserId IS NOT NULL AND authUserId != ''

collections.name: games
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_games_status ON games (status)
CREATE INDEX idx_games_map ON games (mapId)

collections.name: game_players
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_game_players_game_player ON game_players (gameId, playerId)
CREATE INDEX idx_game_players_status ON game_players (gameId, status)

collections.name: tickets
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_tickets_game_status ON tickets (gameId, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_tickets_owner ON tickets (ownerPlayerId, status)

collections.name: player_tickets
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_player_tickets_unique ON player_tickets (gameId, playerId, ticketId)
CREATE INDEX idx_player_tickets_ticket ON player_tickets (ticketId)

collections.name: journeys
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_journeys_game_player_status ON journeys (gameId, playerId, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_journeys_departure ON journeys (gameId, departureTime)

collections.name: shops
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_shops_game_type ON shops (gameId, shopType)

collections.name: shop_items
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_shop_items_game_status ON shop_items (gameId, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_shop_items_ticket ON shop_items (ticketId)

collections.name: auctions
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_auctions_game_status ON auctions (gameId, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_auctions_time ON auctions (gameId, startTime, endTime)

collections.name: auction_bids
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_auction_bids_unique ON auction_bids (auctionId, playerId)
CREATE INDEX idx_auction_bids_amount ON auction_bids (auctionId, bidAmount)

collections.name: blind_boxes
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_blind_boxes_game_status ON blind_boxes (gameId, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_blind_boxes_location ON blind_boxes (gameId, locationId)

collections.name: blind_box_effect_logs
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_blind_box_logs_box_time ON blind_box_effect_logs (blindBoxId, createdAt)
CREATE INDEX idx_blind_box_logs_player ON blind_box_effect_logs (playerId)

collections.name: player_special_states
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_special_states_active ON player_special_states (gameId, playerId, stateType, isConsumed)

collections.name: traffic_incident_requests
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_incidents_game_status ON traffic_incident_requests (gameId, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_incidents_journey ON traffic_incident_requests (journeyId)

collections.name: records
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_records_game_time ON records (gameId, createdAt)
CREATE INDEX idx_records_player_time ON records (playerId, createdAt)
